title: Centrality and Routing
text:
PACKAGES

library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(sfnetworks)
library(tidygraph)



CENTRALITY

data_path <- "C:/Users/celio/Centrality Routing/Data"

velo <- st_read(file.path(data_path, "veloland.gpkg"), quiet = TRUE)

velo <- st_transform(velo, 2056)

net <- as_sfnetwork(velo, directed = FALSE)

net <- net |>
  activate(nodes) |>
  mutate(
    degree = centrality_degree(),
    closeness = centrality_closeness(weights = length),
    betweenness = centrality_betweenness(weights = length)
  )

nodes <- net |> activate(nodes) |> st_as_sf()
edges <- net |> activate(edges) |> st_as_sf()

# AGGREGATE NODE CENTRALITY TO EDGES
edges_cent <- aggregate(
  nodes[, c("degree", "closeness", "betweenness")],
  edges,
  FUN = mean
)

edges$degree <- edges_cent$degree
edges$closeness <- edges_cent$closeness
edges$betweenness <- edges_cent$betweenness

# PLOT DEGREE
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = edges, aes(color = degree), linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  labs(title = "Degree centrality") +
  theme_minimal()







# PLOT CLOSENESS
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = edges, aes(color = closeness), linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  labs(title = "Closeness centrality") +
  theme_minimal()







# PLOT BETWEENNESS
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = edges, aes(color = betweenness), linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  labs(title = "Betweenness centrality") +
  theme_minimal()










ROUTING

locations <- st_read(file.path(data_path, "locations.gpkg"), quiet = TRUE)
locations <- st_transform(locations, 2056)

net <- as_sfnetwork(velo, directed = FALSE)

# choose one origin and all others as destinations
origin <- locations[1, ]
destination <- locations[-1, ]

# find nearest network node for origin and destinations
net_nodes <- net |> activate(nodes) |> st_as_sf()

origin_node <- st_nearest_feature(origin, net_nodes)
destination_nodes <- st_nearest_feature(destination, net_nodes)

# shortest paths
paths <- st_network_paths(
  net,
  from = origin_node,
  to = destination_nodes,
  weights = net |> activate(edges) |> pull(length)
)

# edges as sf
edges <- net |> activate(edges) |> st_as_sf()

# build one sf object per path, then combine
path_list <- lapply(seq_along(paths$edge_paths), function(i) {
  idx <- unlist(paths$edge_paths[[i]])
  if (length(idx) == 0) return(NULL)
  path_sf <- edges[idx, ]
  path_sf$destination_id <- i
  path_sf
})

path_list <- path_list[!sapply(path_list, is.null)]
routes_sf <- do.call(rbind, path_list)

# plot
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = edges, color = "grey80", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_sf(data = routes_sf, aes(color = factor(destination_id)), linewidth = 0.9, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_sf(data = destination, color = "black", size = 2) +
  geom_sf(data = origin, color = "red", size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Shortest paths from origin to all destinations") +
  theme_minimal()
